"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); const utils = require("../../utils"); class EntryTransformer { constructor(_settings) { this._settings = _settings; } getTransformer() { return (entry) => this._transform(entry); } _transform(entry) { let filepath = entry.path; if (this._settings.absolute) { filepath = utils.path.makeAbsolute(this._settings.cwd, filepath); filepath = utils.path.unixify(filepath); } if (this._settings.markDirectories && entry.dirent.isDirectory()) { filepath += '/'; } if (!this._settings.objectMode) { return filepath; } return Object.assign(Object.assign({}, entry), { path: filepath }); } } exports.default = EntryTransformer;
